agents.name: Governance & Security
agents.description: Cybersecurity RAG agent for Bosch security policies, EISA controls, CD-09000/CD-02900 directives, ISO 27002 mappings, and related FAQs. Powered by CyberAgent with hybrid retrieval, confidence scoring, and citation-backed answers.

handles: Bosch corporate cybersecurity directives: CD-09000 (Cybersecurity Requirements Catalogue), CD-02900 (Data Protection Notice Kit for Websites)

EISA controls catalogue — Bosch internal IT security controls across: access control (ACC), communication security (COM), configuration management, asset management, incident management, vulnerability management, and more
ISO 27002:2022 control mapping and cross-references to Bosch-specific controls

RBGF directives: RBGF-00177 (IT Ownership and Standardized Binding), Directive-105 (Information Security and Data Protection), Directive-177 (Information Technology and Digitalization), Directive-183 (One Security)
Corporate Good Practice guides: CGP-80010 (Bosch Cybersecurity General Requirements), CGP-09000 (M&A Activities and CD-09000 compliance)
Crisis and business continuity: RBCP-05252, RBCP-05253 (Corporate Crisis Management Procedures)
CD-04602 One Industrial IT Security standard, EISA Cybersecurity Requirements Catalogue
Cybersecurity lifecycle policies, cybersecurity concept mapping, systems mapping documents

Cybersecurity topics: access control, authentication, encryption, network segmentation, vulnerability management, incident response, patching, backup and recovery, monitoring and logging, data classification, supplier/third-party security, cloud security, IoT/OT/Industrial IT security, identity and authorization management, penetration testing, hardening, security awareness training
Compliance and audit readiness checks against Bosch cybersecurity standards
Cross-document comparisons (e.g. how CD-09000 compares with EISA or ISO 27002 on the same topic)
Lookup of specific control IDs (e.g. EISA-ACC-201), section numbers (e.g. 4.2.1), FAQ entries, or binding type (ND=mandatory, DI=recommended)
does_not_handle: IT helpdesk requests: laptop issues, VPN problems, printer setup, software installation → use facility-it-support
Employee expense claims, travel reimbursements, receipt submissions → use ezyclaim or internet-reimbursement
HR topics: new employee onboarding, training schedules, team introductions → use employee-onboarding
Retirement and pension queries: PF balance, gratuity, pension planning → use retiral-benefits
Cab or taxi booking, ride scheduling → use ezycabs
Canteen menus, meal pre-orders, food feedback → use canteen-services
Visitor registration, gate passes, guest management → use visitor-management
General knowledge questions not grounded in Bosch security documents
example_queries: What are the mandatory password complexity requirements under CD-09000?
How does EISA-ACC-201 relate to ISO 27002 control 8.5?
What does CD-02900 require for data protection notices on Bosch websites?
List all binding (ND) requirements for network segmentation in the Bosch cybersecurity catalogue
What is the incident response procedure defined in the EISA controls?
Show me the supplier security requirements in CD-09000
Compare CD-09000 and EISA requirements on encryption
What does RBGF-00177 say about IT ownership responsibilities?
Which cybersecurity requirements apply to cloud deployments under Bosch directives?
What are the key differences between CD-09000 and the EISA requirements catalogue?
knowledge.routing_hint: Route to this agent for ANY question about Bosch security documents, EISA/ISO control IDs, compliance requirements, cybersecurity policies, or IT security topics — even if the query also touches other subjects.

agents.name: Internet Reimbursement
agents.description: Handles internet expense reimbursement claims, validates receipts, and processes monthly allowance payouts.

handles: Internet/broadband expense reimbursement: claim submission, receipt validation, monthly allowance processing and payout tracking
knowledge.routing_hint: Use only for internet or broadband reimbursement claims.

agents.name: EzyClaim
agents.description: Streamlines employee expense claims including travel, meals, and miscellaneous reimbursements.

handles: Employee expense claims: travel (flights, hotels, trains), meals, accommodation, business miscellaneous, receipt upload and approval routing
knowledge.routing_hint: Use for general expense claim filing, travel reimbursements, and receipt submissions.

agents.name: EzyCabs
agents.description: Manages cab booking, ride scheduling, route optimization, and corporate transport services.

handles: Corporate cab booking, taxi scheduling, ride requests, route planning, and fare estimation for business travel
knowledge.routing_hint: Use for cab or taxi booking, ride scheduling, or transport logistics.

agents.name: Canteen Services
agents.description: Provides daily menu information, meal pre-ordering, dietary preferences management, and cafeteria feedback.

handles: Daily cafeteria menus, meal pre-ordering, dietary preference filters, and canteen feedback and ratings
knowledge.routing_hint: Use for cafeteria menus, meal orders, and canteen-related queries.

agents.name: Employee Guided Onboarding
agents.description: Guides new joiners through the onboarding process, documentation, training schedules, and team introductions.

handles: New employee onboarding checklists, documentation collection, training schedules, buddy assignment, and team introductions
knowledge.routing_hint: Use for onboarding, new employee orientation, and training scheduling.

agents.name: Triage Process
agents.description: Classifies, prioritizes, and routes incoming requests or tickets to the appropriate teams or agents.

handles: Internal query classification, request routing, priority assignment, and SLA monitoring
knowledge.routing_hint: Internal routing agent — not directly callable by users for domain questions.

agents.name: Visitor Management
agents.description: Handles visitor pre-registration, gate pass generation, host notifications, and check-in/check-out tracking.

handles: Visitor pre-registration, gate pass generation, host notifications, and check-in/check-out tracking for physical facility access
knowledge.routing_hint: Use for visitor registration, gate passes, and guest management.

agents.name: Retiral Benefits
agents.description: Provides information on provident fund, gratuity, pension plans, and retirement benefit calculations.

handles: Provident fund (PF) balance inquiries, gratuity calculations, pension planning, and retirement benefit statements
knowledge.routing_hint: Use for PF balance, gratuity, pension, and retirement benefit questions.

agents.name: Facility & IT Support
agents.description: Manages IT helpdesk tickets, facility maintenance requests, asset provisioning, and infrastructure issues.

handles: IT helpdesk: laptop issues, VPN setup, printer/scanner problems, software requests, asset provisioning; facility maintenance: office repairs, room booking, infrastructure issues
knowledge.routing_hint: Use for IT support tickets, device issues, VPN/network problems, and facility maintenance requests.
